result.stderr:
TerminalGuiDesigner 2.0.0-develop.4538+109506afba6a59ef6b1577219d88b638efa66b17
Copyright (C) 2026 Thomas Nind
USAGE:
Run the application:
  TerminalGuiDesigner -d v2
Open existing MyExistingView.cs:
  TerminalGuiDesigner -d v2 ../MyProject/MyExistingView.cs
Create a new Dialog called MyNewView.cs:
  TerminalGuiDesigner -d v2 -n MyApp -v Dialog ../MyProject/MyNewView.cs

  -v               The type of root View to create (e.g. Window, Dialog)

  -n               The C# namespace to be used for the View code generated

  -e               Enables experimental features

  -d               (Default: v2) Driver to use. v2, v2net, v2win, WindowsDriver,
                   CursesDriver or NetDriver

  -q               Pass to suppress log generation

  --help           Display this help screen.

  --version        Display version information.

  path (pos. 0)    New to create or existing file to open.
